fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence. Each frame
combines pixel data (as an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>) with a display duration.

Use one of the constructors to create a frame from an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap>,
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage>, or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>. The bitmap or image must remain
alive and unmodified for the duration of the encoding operation.

Pass an array or span of frames to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame},SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions)>
to produce an animated WebP file.
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, combining pixel data with a display duration.
Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a bitmap and a duration.

params.duration: The length of time this frame is displayed.
params.bitmap: The source bitmap. Cannot be <see langword="null" /> and must support pixel access.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a raster-backed image and a duration.

params.duration: The length of time this frame is displayed.
params.image: The source image. Cannot be <see langword="null" /> and must be raster-backed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a pixmap and a duration.

params.pixmap: The source pixmap. Cannot be <see langword="null" />.
params.duration: The length of time this frame is displayed.

fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.TimeSpan" /> representing how long this frame is shown before advancing to the next frame.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the display duration of this frame.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the frame's pixel data.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
